_meta.spine_source_primary: TX State Board of Public Accountancy (TSBPA) Firm Lookup at https://portal.tsbpa.texas.gov/php/fpl/frmlookup.php — confirmed reachable but POST-form gated; NOT directly fetchable via WebFetch. License-level data deferred to enrich phase.
spine_sources_used: Live firm-website fetches (primary verification per skill non-negotiable §2)
Google search for `<city> CPA firm independent established`

sources_blocked.reason: Form requires POST with cFirmName/cCity/cState/cZip params; WebFetch is GET-only. Each firm in this spine has been verified via direct firm-website fetch instead. License-number capture deferred to enrich phase (which can use a browser-tool MCP).

Stratta CPA PLLC) as elevated succession-trigger.
